title: myogalum flavescens
intro: Myogalum flavescens, also known as Yellow Milk-vetch or Yellow Vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia and is part of the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. Myogalum flavescens can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal formulas, with the roots being the most commonly used part for its medicinal purposes.
